items.name: Minh Huy
items.quote: This space feels genuinely different — it makes me want to push myself every time I walk in. The equipment is top-tier.

items.name: Tu Anh
items.quote: The yoga classes really help me unwind after work. The instructors are dedicated and truly professional.

items.name: Nam Quan
items.quote: The PT package is well worth it. I lost 5kg of fat and gained 2kg of muscle after just two months of serious training with my coach.
